title: Dynamic Streetlights
description: Adds a realastic functional streetlight model.
body:

Support me on [Kofi](https://ko-fi.com/zigqora)

Bring Your Cities to Life

Tired of using basic wooden fence posts and glowstone for your modern streetlights? Dynamic Streetlight introduces a highly detailed, standalone street lamp block designed to add realism and atmosphere to your Minecraft worlds.

Whether you are building a massive modern metropolis, setting up a city roleplay server, or designing life-like sets for machinima production, lighting is everything. This mod provides a lightweight, plug-and-play decorative prop that instantly elevates the visual quality of your streets without bloating your game with hundreds of unrelated furniture items.



This mod was built for players who care about the fine details. By adding this block to your game, you can completely transform flat, boring asphalt roads into immersive, professional-looking environments. It gives builders and content creators the perfect background infrastructure to make their worlds feel grounded, modern, and lived-in.



 !! Read Licence to know more about using this in your professional projects !!
 

Perfect for:

Modern city builders and urban planners.
Roleplay servers needing realistic street infrastructure.
vVideo creators and directors looking for authentic props for set design
